zh.lifeSummary: 當Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva於大約1180年出生在義大利皮蒙特辛薩盧左時，他的父親Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva37歲，母親Donna Maria di Vento23歲。他於大約1210年與Lucrezia De Valperga在義大利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。他去世於1228年11月25日之後。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ceva,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Albanian (Çela): from Çelë (definite form Çela), an old personal name or nickname (for a brother-in-law) shortened from Turkish çelebi, a title of royal princes, dervish saints, and educated men which also used to denote a ‘brother-in-law’. This is one of the most common surnames in Albania.
Spanish and Portuguese: habitational name from any of numerous places called Cela, from Latin cella ‘little room’, especially in the sense of ‘sanctuary’.

nameMeanings.name: Guglielmo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva was born about 1180, in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piedmont, Italy, his father, Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva, was 37 and his mother, Donna Maria di Vento, was 23. He married Lucrezia De Valperga about 1210, in Italy. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. He died after 25 November 1228.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva est né environ 1180, à Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italie, son père, Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Donna Maria di Vento, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lucrezia De Valperga environ 1210, à Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Il est décédé après 25 novembre 1228.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva um 1180 in Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva 37 und seine Mutter Donna Maria di Vento 23. Er hat um 1210 in Italien Lucrezia De Valperga geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Er starb nach 25. November 1228.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva è nato il circa 1180 nel Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, il suo padre, Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Donna Maria di Vento, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lucrezia De Valperga circa 1210, nel Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli. Morì dopo il 25 novembre 1228.

ja.lifeSummary: Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Cevaが約1180年にイタリアピエモントクウネオサルズゾで生まれた時，父Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Cevaは37歳，母Donna Maria di Ventoは23歳であった。約1210年にイタリアでLucrezia De Valpergaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼は1228年11月25日以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva(이)가 대략 1180년 이탈리아 피몽 쿤오 살루즈오에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Donna Maria di Vento(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1210년 이탈리아에서 Lucrezia De Valperga(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1228년 11월 25일 이후 사망했다.

mn.Abt 1180–after 25 November 1228: ойролцоогоор 1180 он–1228 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 25–наас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva nasceu aproximadamente 1180, em Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Itália, seu pai, Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Donna Maria di Vento, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lucrezia De Valperga aproximadamente 1210, em Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. Ele faleceu após 25 de novembro de 1228.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva родился около 1180 г. в местности салуззо, кунео, пиемонт, Италия, его отцу по имени Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Donna Maria di Vento, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucrezia De Valperga около 1210 г. в местности Италия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Он умер после 25 ноябрь 1228 г.

sm.Abt 1180–after 25 November 1228: e tusa o le 1180–ina ua ma'ea le 25 Novema 1228

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guglielmo II de Ceva, Marquis de Ceva nació aproximadamente 1180, en Saluzzo, Cuneo, Piemonte, Italia, su papá, Guglielmo I del Vasto, Marquis di Ceva, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Donna Maria di Vento, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lucrezia De Valperga aproximadamente 1210, en Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió después de 25 de noviembre de 1228.
